category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Jordan) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Jordan Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入约旦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入約旦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Jordan requirements: JSMO conformity certificate where in scope, JS/IEC 62133 cell safety, TRC type approval for wireless functions, UN 38.3 transport, and the in-country importer obligation. Jordan does not operate an EU-style horizontal battery regulation, RoHS, or EPR regime.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与约旦要求对照：适用范围内的JSMO符合性证书、JS/IEC 62133电芯安全、无线功能的TRC型号核准、UN 38.3运输及在地进口商义务。约旦未实行欧盟式横向电池法规、RoHS或EPR制度。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與約旦要求對照：適用範圍內的JSMO符合性證書、JS/IEC 62133電芯安全、無線功能的TRC型號核准、UN 38.3運輸及在地進口商義務。約旦未實行歐盟式橫向電池法規、RoHS或EPR制度。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters targeting Jordan must satisfy JSMO conformity requirements where the product is in a regulated category, evidence cell safety against JS/IEC 62133, obtain TRC type approval for any wireless functions, hold a valid UN 38.3 transport test report, and ship through an in-country Jordanian importer — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification. Jordan operates on a 230 V, 50 Hz grid and does not impose an EU-style battery regulation, RoHS, or EPR regime.
answer_first.zh: 面向约旦的中国锂电池及移动电源出口商，须在产品属受监管类别时满足JSMO符合性要求、依JS/IEC 62133提供电芯安全证据、为任何无线功能取得TRC型号核准、持有有效的UN 38.3运输测试报告，并经由约旦在地进口商进口——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。约旦电网为230伏、50赫兹，且未实行欧盟式电池法规、RoHS或EPR制度。
answer_first.zht: 面向約旦的中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商，須在產品屬受監管類別時滿足JSMO符合性要求、依JS/IEC 62133提供電芯安全證據、為任何無線功能取得TRC型號核准、持有有效的UN 38.3運輸測試報告，並經由約旦在地進口商進口——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。約旦電網為230伏、50赫茲，且未實行歐盟式電池法規、RoHS或EPR制度。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator or standards-body sources preferred (jsmo.gov.jo, trc.gov.jo, unece.org, iec.ch); local PDFs are not accepted.
